# Meridian Partners

> Boutique cybersecurity advisory for regulated enterprises. Fractional CISO (vCISO), compliance gap analysis, AI security readiness, independent vendor evaluation, and a dedicated DFSA · FSRA regulatory practice. Offices in London and Dubai; UAE-incorporated (Meridian Partners FZCO, IFZA Licence 89800). Operating across EMEA, APAC, and the Americas.

Meridian Partners advises boards and executive teams in regulated finance, insurance, hospitality, and healthcare. Independence is core: no vendor commissions, no reseller incentives, transparent month-to-month retainers. Engagements are led by senior practitioners holding CISSP, CISM, CRISC, and CCIE.

## Services
- [Fractional CISO](https://meridianpartners.me/fractional-ciso.html): Board-level security leadership on retainer — strategy, governance, regulator dialogue, named-CISO appointments for DIFC/ADGM firms.
- [Compliance Gap Analysis](https://meridianpartners.me/gap-analysis.html): ISO 27001:2022, PCI DSS v4.0, GDPR, and UAE PDPL readiness with prioritised remediation roadmaps.
- [AI Security Readiness & Gap Analysis](https://meridianpartners.me/gap-analysis.html#ai-readiness): ISO/IEC 42001 and EU AI Act readiness, AI risk register and model inventory, LLM/GenAI usage assessment, vendor AI due diligence.
- [Vendor Evaluation & Negotiation](https://meridianpartners.me/vendor-evaluation.html): Independent technical evaluation and commercial negotiation for major security and technology purchases — zero vendor kickbacks.
- [DFSA · FSRA Regulatory Practice](https://meridianpartners.me/dfsa-fsra-practice.html): Cybersecurity (DFSA GEN 5.5), operational resilience, and business continuity for DIFC and ADGM authorised firms, delivered to regulator evidential expectations.

## Industries
- [Industries overview](https://meridianpartners.me/industries.html): Banks, exchanges, brokers, fintechs, payment providers, virtual-asset firms (DFSA, FSRA, CBUAE, VARA), insurance & brokers, hospitality & resorts, healthcare & life sciences.

## Key pages
- [Services hub](https://meridianpartners.me/services.html): All practices with transparent retainer tiers.
- [About](https://meridianpartners.me/about.html): Firm model, five-step engagement method, credentials.
- [Contact](https://meridianpartners.me/contact.html): 30-minute strategic consultation (no fee) and FAQ.
- [DFSA & FSRA Cyber Readiness Checklist](https://meridianpartners.me/readiness-checklist.html): Free 38-point self-assessment for DIFC and ADGM authorised firms.
